name: EuiHighlight
description: Wraps text and highlights a substring match (for search results).

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

children.description: string to highlight as this component's content

hasScreenReaderHelpText.description:
Set to `false` to remove the CSS :before and :after
screen reader helper text

search.description:
What to search for.

Allows passing an array of strings (searching by multiple separate
words or phrases) **only** if `highlightAll` is also set to `true`.

strict.description: Should the search be strict or not

example: <EuiHighlight hasScreenReaderHelpText search="Quick">The quick brown fox jumped over the lazy dog.</EuiHighlight>
